description: Narrative prompts for Expanding Events. Roll three Plot Points and combine them to create a Turning Point that advances your story.

descriptionTranslations.en: Narrative prompts for Expanding Events. Roll three Plot Points and combine them to create a Turning Point that advances your story.

entries.result: Attack!: A character or group is attacked in some way

resultTranslations.en: Attack!: A character or group is attacked in some way

entries.result: A Needed Resource Runs Out: A valuable resource has run out, and the lack causes problems

resultTranslations.en: A Needed Resource Runs Out: A valuable resource has run out, and the lack causes problems

entries.result: Information: Information, of some sort, is important in this Turning Point

resultTranslations.en: Information: Information, of some sort, is important in this Turning Point

entries.result: Outcast: A character or group is considered an outcast by others for some reason

resultTranslations.en: Outcast: A character or group is considered an outcast by others for some reason

entries.result: Persuasion: A character or group tries to persuade someone to do something, from pleading to threatening

resultTranslations.en: Persuasion: A character or group tries to persuade someone to do something, from pleading to threatening

entries.result: Collateral Damage: Whatever is going on causes harm to the world around it, physical or otherwise

resultTranslations.en: Collateral Damage: Whatever is going on causes harm to the world around it, physical or otherwise

entries.result: Into the Unknown: A character or group enters a situation with unknown factors

resultTranslations.en: Into the Unknown: A character or group enters a situation with unknown factors

entries.result: Sold!: This Turning Point includes a sale of some kind - goods, information, or business dealings

resultTranslations.en: Sold!: This Turning Point includes a sale of some kind - goods, information, or business dealings

entries.result: Assistance: A character or group assists another, or help is requested

resultTranslations.en: Assistance: A character or group assists another, or help is requested

entries.result: Dealing with a Calamity: A character or group fights a calamity, such as extinguishing a burning building

resultTranslations.en: Dealing with a Calamity: A character or group fights a calamity, such as extinguishing a burning building

entries.result: Impending Doom: Something terrible is approaching, such as an invading army

resultTranslations.en: Impending Doom: Something terrible is approaching, such as an invading army

entries.result: This Isn't Working: Something that is supposed to work is not, causing a problem

resultTranslations.en: This Isn't Working: Something that is supposed to work is not, causing a problem

entries.result: A Gathering: A social gathering for a purpose - a nightclub, celebration, wedding, funeral, etc.

resultTranslations.en: A Gathering: A social gathering for a purpose - a nightclub, celebration, wedding, funeral, etc.

entries.result: Ill Will: A character or group harbors ill will toward another for some reason

resultTranslations.en: Ill Will: A character or group harbors ill will toward another for some reason

entries.result: Ambush: Sudden aggressive action at an unexpected time

resultTranslations.en: Ambush: Sudden aggressive action at an unexpected time

entries.result: Shady Places: A less than legitimate location is involved, such as a secret gambling hall

resultTranslations.en: Shady Places: A less than legitimate location is involved, such as a secret gambling hall

entries.result: It's Gone: An important object or resource is gone - theft or mystery disappearance

resultTranslations.en: It's Gone: An important object or resource is gone - theft or mystery disappearance

entries.result: Religion: Some aspect of religion or religious belief is involved

resultTranslations.en: Religion: Some aspect of religion or religious belief is involved

entries.result: Do It or Else: A character or group is given a task and pressured into completing it

resultTranslations.en: Do It or Else: A character or group is given a task and pressured into completing it

entries.result: Character Has a Clever Idea: A character has an idea that impacts this Turning Point

resultTranslations.en: Character Has a Clever Idea: A character has an idea that impacts this Turning Point

entries.result: Crime: A crime is committed or discovered

resultTranslations.en: Crime: A crime is committed or discovered

entries.result: An Organization: An organization is involved, such as a thieves guild covering for a member

resultTranslations.en: An Organization: An organization is involved, such as a thieves guild covering for a member

entries.result: It Is Your Duty: A character or group is charged with carrying out a duty they have little choice in

resultTranslations.en: It Is Your Duty: A character or group is charged with carrying out a duty they have little choice in

entries.result: Catastrophe: The worst thing that can happen does happen, spectacularly

resultTranslations.en: Catastrophe: The worst thing that can happen does happen, spectacularly

entries.result: Fortuitous Find: Something very useful is found - the right thing at the right time

resultTranslations.en: Fortuitous Find: Something very useful is found - the right thing at the right time

entries.result: A Meeting of Minds: Two characters or groups come together for an important discussion

resultTranslations.en: A Meeting of Minds: Two characters or groups come together for an important discussion

entries.result: Connection Severed: A character or group with a connection to another severs that connection

resultTranslations.en: Connection Severed: A character or group with a connection to another severs that connection

entries.result: Something Is Getting Away: Time is running out before something gets away

resultTranslations.en: Something Is Getting Away: Time is running out before something gets away

entries.result: Find It or Else: Something crucial needs to be found - an object, witness, or resource

resultTranslations.en: Find It or Else: Something crucial needs to be found - an object, witness, or resource

entries.result: Fame: Whatever is happening involves someone famous to some extent

resultTranslations.en: Fame: Whatever is happening involves someone famous to some extent

entries.result: Humiliation: A character or group is deeply embarrassed

resultTranslations.en: Humiliation: A character or group is deeply embarrassed

entries.result: Hunted: A character or group is being hunted by another

resultTranslations.en: Hunted: A character or group is being hunted by another

entries.result: All Is Revealed!: Details about something are revealed

resultTranslations.en: All Is Revealed!: Details about something are revealed

entries.result: Injustice: An injustice of some kind occurs

resultTranslations.en: Injustice: An injustice of some kind occurs

entries.result: Betrayal!: An ally turns on or otherwise betrays someone who trusted them

resultTranslations.en: Betrayal!: An ally turns on or otherwise betrays someone who trusted them

entries.result: Chase: One character is pursuing another

resultTranslations.en: Chase: One character is pursuing another

entries.result: Retaliation: An element of retaliation or revenge is involved

resultTranslations.en: Retaliation: An element of retaliation or revenge is involved

entries.result: The Hidden Hand: Whatever is happening was caused by someone unknown

resultTranslations.en: The Hidden Hand: Whatever is happening was caused by someone unknown

entries.result: Escape: An escape of some sort, such as a captured character slipping away

resultTranslations.en: Escape: An escape of some sort, such as a captured character slipping away

entries.result: Diminished: A character or group is rendered out of commission or less effective

resultTranslations.en: Diminished: A character or group is rendered out of commission or less effective

entries.result: It's a Secret: An activity done in secret, hidden from public view

resultTranslations.en: It's a Secret: An activity done in secret, hidden from public view

entries.result: Powerful Person: Someone powerful is involved - physically powerful or an influential authority

resultTranslations.en: Powerful Person: Someone powerful is involved - physically powerful or an influential authority

entries.result: Family Matters: Members of a family or close friends are involved

resultTranslations.en: Family Matters: Members of a family or close friends are involved

entries.result: Fortified: A guarded and dangerous location is involved

resultTranslations.en: Fortified: A guarded and dangerous location is involved

entries.result: Liar!: A lie or deception is involved

resultTranslations.en: Liar!: A lie or deception is involved

entries.result: The Promise of Reward: A character or group stands to gain a substantial reward

resultTranslations.en: The Promise of Reward: A character or group stands to gain a substantial reward

entries.result: Rescue: Someone is rescued or needs to be rescued

resultTranslations.en: Rescue: Someone is rescued or needs to be rescued

entries.result: Secret Weapon: A secret weapon is revealed that sways the balance of power

resultTranslations.en: Secret Weapon: A secret weapon is revealed that sways the balance of power

entries.result: Headquarters: Someone's primary headquarters is involved

resultTranslations.en: Headquarters: Someone's primary headquarters is involved

entries.result: Contest: A contest or competition of some kind, such as a gladiatorial fight or race

resultTranslations.en: Contest: A contest or competition of some kind, such as a gladiatorial fight or race

entries.result: Dead: Someone important is dead, and the death changes things

resultTranslations.en: Dead: Someone important is dead, and the death changes things

entries.result: Urban Setting: This Turning Point takes place in a town or city

resultTranslations.en: Urban Setting: This Turning Point takes place in a town or city

entries.result: A Figure from the Past: Someone important from the past is involved

resultTranslations.en: A Figure from the Past: Someone important from the past is involved

entries.result: Crescendo: A series of events culminates in this Turning Point

resultTranslations.en: Crescendo: A series of events culminates in this Turning Point

entries.result: Disappearance: Someone important is nowhere to be found

resultTranslations.en: Disappearance: Someone important is nowhere to be found

entries.result: Power Over Others: A character or group has power over another

resultTranslations.en: Power Over Others: A character or group has power over another

entries.result: Run Away!: A character or group flees for some reason

resultTranslations.en: Run Away!: A character or group flees for some reason

entries.result: Taking Chances: Someone important acts in a very risky way

resultTranslations.en: Taking Chances: Someone important acts in a very risky way

entries.result: Wrong Theory: A character or group takes action on a theory that turns out to be wrong

resultTranslations.en: Wrong Theory: A character or group takes action on a theory that turns out to be wrong

entries.result: A Group Is in Trouble: A group, such as a community, is in trouble

resultTranslations.en: A Group Is in Trouble: A group, such as a community, is in trouble

entries.result: Mass Battle: Combat involving many combatants - a team fight or war battle

resultTranslations.en: Mass Battle: Combat involving many combatants - a team fight or war battle

entries.result: Evidence: Something is found that helps settle an existing question

resultTranslations.en: Evidence: Something is found that helps settle an existing question

entries.result: Enemies: Enemies of someone or something important in the Expanding Event are involved

resultTranslations.en: Enemies: Enemies of someone or something important in the Expanding Event are involved

entries.result: Distraction: A distraction plays an important role

resultTranslations.en: Distraction: A distraction plays an important role

entries.result: A New Enemy: A new threat is presented to a character or group

resultTranslations.en: A New Enemy: A new threat is presented to a character or group

entries.result: An Old Deal: An agreement made long ago, probably before this Event, is involved

resultTranslations.en: An Old Deal: An agreement made long ago, probably before this Event, is involved

entries.result: Untouchable: A character or group is, in some manner, untouchable

resultTranslations.en: Untouchable: A character or group is, in some manner, untouchable

entries.result: Stop That: Someone stops something from happening

resultTranslations.en: Stop That: Someone stops something from happening

entries.result: Remote Location: A remote location is involved, such as a cave or cabin in the woods

resultTranslations.en: Remote Location: A remote location is involved, such as a cave or cabin in the woods

entries.result: Rural Setting: A rural setting is involved, such as countryside or a farm

resultTranslations.en: Rural Setting: A rural setting is involved, such as countryside or a farm

entries.result: Expert Knowledge: A character or group with specialized knowledge or skills is involved

resultTranslations.en: Expert Knowledge: A character or group with specialized knowledge or skills is involved

entries.result: Victory!: A character or group achieves a victory

resultTranslations.en: Victory!: A character or group achieves a victory

entries.result: The Secret to the Power: There is a power, and it has a secret source

resultTranslations.en: The Secret to the Power: There is a power, and it has a secret source

entries.result: The Leader: The leader of a group is involved

resultTranslations.en: The Leader: The leader of a group is involved

entries.result: Bad Decision: Someone's decision has turned out to be a very bad one

resultTranslations.en: Bad Decision: Someone's decision has turned out to be a very bad one

entries.result: A Moment of Peace: Whatever else is going on, it is overall a peaceful time

resultTranslations.en: A Moment of Peace: Whatever else is going on, it is overall a peaceful time

entries.result: Wrong Story: A new, accurate version of a known account is revealed

resultTranslations.en: Wrong Story: A new, accurate version of a known account is revealed

entries.result: Conflict: A disagreement between characters or groups leads to conflict

resultTranslations.en: Conflict: A disagreement between characters or groups leads to conflict

entries.result: Prized Possession: Someone's important possession is involved

resultTranslations.en: Prized Possession: Someone's important possession is involved

entries.result: Used Against Them: A resource aligned with one character or group is turned against them

resultTranslations.en: Used Against Them: A resource aligned with one character or group is turned against them

entries.result: Mystery Solved: A mystery is solved, either large or minor

resultTranslations.en: Mystery Solved: A mystery is solved, either large or minor

entries.result: Fish Out of Water: An element that is out of place in its situation is involved

resultTranslations.en: Fish Out of Water: An element that is out of place in its situation is involved

entries.result: Sudden Cessation: Something happening suddenly stops, possibly for unknown reasons

resultTranslations.en: Sudden Cessation: Something happening suddenly stops, possibly for unknown reasons

entries.result: A Problem Returns: A problem thought resolved returns in some fashion

resultTranslations.en: A Problem Returns: A problem thought resolved returns in some fashion

entries.result: Observer: Something presumed private is witnessed or observed

resultTranslations.en: Observer: Something presumed private is witnessed or observed

entries.result: Destroy the Thing: Something must be destroyed in this Turning Point

resultTranslations.en: Destroy the Thing: Something must be destroyed in this Turning Point

entries.result: A Need to Hide: A character or group must hide from something or someone

resultTranslations.en: A Need to Hide: A character or group must hide from something or someone

entries.result: Travel Setting: This Turning Point takes place in a traveling vehicle - boat, train, spaceship, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Travel Setting: This Turning Point takes place in a traveling vehicle - boat, train, spaceship, etc.

entries.result: It's All About You: This Turning Point is primarily about one person or group

resultTranslations.en: It's All About You: This Turning Point is primarily about one person or group

entries.result: Something Strange: Whatever is happening involves something very unusual

resultTranslations.en: Something Strange: Whatever is happening involves something very unusual

entries.result: Savior: Someone offers to, or in fact does, save the day

resultTranslations.en: Savior: Someone offers to, or in fact does, save the day

entries.result: Stepping Up: A character or group becomes more important for some reason

resultTranslations.en: Stepping Up: A character or group becomes more important for some reason

entries.result: Crash: A vehicle crash becomes important to the Expanding Event

resultTranslations.en: Crash: A vehicle crash becomes important to the Expanding Event

entries.result: Vulnerability Exploited: A vulnerability of some kind is being exploited

resultTranslations.en: Vulnerability Exploited: A vulnerability of some kind is being exploited

entries.result: Government: Government is involved in some way

resultTranslations.en: Government: Government is involved in some way

entries.result: Connection: A character or group forms a connection with another - personal interest or alliance

resultTranslations.en: Connection: A character or group forms a connection with another - personal interest or alliance

entries.result: Obstacle to Overcome: A character or group faces an obstacle that must be overcome

resultTranslations.en: Obstacle to Overcome: A character or group faces an obstacle that must be overcome

entries.result: It's a Trap!: A trap of some kind is involved

resultTranslations.en: It's a Trap!: A trap of some kind is involved

entries.result: Dead End: A promising lead or clue turns out to be a dead end

resultTranslations.en: Dead End: A promising lead or clue turns out to be a dead end

entries.result: Servant: A servant or proxy of another character or group is involved

resultTranslations.en: Servant: A servant or proxy of another character or group is involved
